summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing Cleanup-Artifacts.Tests.ps1 (Pester test file)—workflow fails immediately at line referencing ./Cleanup-Artifacts.Tests.ps1. Also missing .actrc file copied unconditionally by Test-Workflow.ps1. Action ref actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA per requirements. Dead code block at end of Cleanup-Artifacts.ps1 (lines after final function) serves no purpose. Cannot ship—workflow and test harness both fail on execution.
